top_signals.title: German Industrial Output Rises for First Time Since War Began
top_signals.summary: German industrial production grew for the first time since war broke out in Iran, fueling hope that Europe’s largest economy is weathering the jump in energy costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BlackRock to Offer Space ETF That Will Add New IPOs Within Days
top_signals.summary: BlackRock Inc. is launching a new space ETF for European investors that will add newly listed companies within 10 to 30 days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Saudi Contractor MGC Said to Postpone $799 Million Riyadh IPO
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia’s Mutlaq Al-Ghowairi Contracting Co. has postponed plans for an initial public offering that was set to raise as much as $799 million and rank as the region’s first major listing of the year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Hat trick of tech IPOs complete with OpenAI filing
top_signals.summary: OpenAI confidentially files for IPO, adding to a blockbuster tech line-up as the AI giant joins Anthropic and SpaceX in going to market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Exposed by the Justice Department, Epstein survivors come under attack
top_signals.summary: Women who accused the late financier of sexual abuse have faced threats, harassment and intimidation by trolls, haters and other foes.
